name: Pasta Puttanesca from the Pantry
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Mostaccioli, rigatoni or other medium pasta shape
3 oz White tuna packed in water, drained and flaked
3 tbsp Chopped pitted olives (green or black)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan over medium heat, heat Super Low-Fat Tomato Sauce until warmed through, stirring occasionally. Stir in tuna, parsley, olives, and anchovies; simmer 5 minutes. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Return pasta to pot; add tuna sauce and stir until it is evenly distributed.
4. To serve, transfer pasta to bowls or plates; serve immediately, sprinkled with Parmesan or Romano cheese.
